let (response, httpResponse) = client.postBanUserFromComment(
  commentId = "cmt-8f3a1b",
  banEmail = false,
  banEmailDomain = false,
  banIP = false,
  deleteAllUsersComments = false,
  bannedUntil = "",
  isShadowBan = false,
  updateId = "",
  banReason = "",
  sso = ""
)
if response.isSome:
  let banResult = response.get()
  discard banResult
else:
  echo "No ban result returned"
